scripts.certify: npm run validate && npm run selfcheck && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run eval-gate
scripts.test: tsx --test packages/engine/src/grade.test.ts packages/evaluator/src/aggregate.test.ts packages/evaluator/src/routing.test.ts packages/evaluator/src/model-config.test.ts packages/lesson/src/review.test.ts packages/store/src/file.test.ts packages/store/src/content.test.ts packages/store/src/pglite.test.ts packages/store/src/queue.test.ts packages/grading/src/worker.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/engine/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/lesson/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/evaluator/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/sandbox/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/store/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/grading/tsconfig.json
